signals.raw: YES** on prediction market movement from Trump's April 16 signals of potential Israel-Lebanon direct talks (first in 34 years) and Strait of Hormuz reopening under US pressure, though gaps persist on Hezbollah disarmament and fighting continues.[1][3][4]
